suggestions: I'm grateful for a smooth production deployment today with zero downtime.
I'm thankful for the quiet, peaceful moments before Fajr to set my intentions for the day.
I'm grateful for that warm cup of teh tarik and a quick break to clear my head after a long coding session.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job in tech that allows me to support myself and contribute to my family.
I'm grateful for finally solving that stubborn bug after staring at the codebase for hours.
I'm thankful for the cool morning rain that made my commute on the LRT much more comfortable.
I'm grateful for supportive team members who helped me resolve a complex git merge conflict without any drama.
I'm thankful for the blessing of having a clean, quiet space to pray my Dhuhr prayer during a busy workday.
I'm grateful for a satisfying, spicy plate of nasi lemak that hit the spot during my lunch break.
I'm thankful for the flexibility of working from home today, saving me from the dreaded peak-hour traffic jam.
I'm grateful for the opportunity to learn a new framework that will help me grow as a developer.
I'm thankful for my parents' constant prayers and encouragement as I navigate the early years of my career.
I'm grateful for a successful sprint planning session where the team was aligned and collaborative.
I'm thankful for the chance to wind down with a game of futsal with friends after a long week of screen time.
I'm grateful for the peace of mind that comes with ending the day knowing I did my best, leaving the rest to the Almighty.
